steps.title: Find the confidence interval from the margin of error
steps.content:
The sample mean is 23.1 pounds and the margin of error is 0.19 pounds. To find the plausible range for the population mean, subtract and add the margin of error.
$$23.1 - 0.19 = 22.91$$
$$23.1 + 0.19 = 23.29$$
Thus the interval is from 22.91 pounds to 23.29 pounds.

steps.title: Match the interval to answer choices
steps.content:
The computed interval 22.91 to 23.29 pounds corresponds to the statement in choice A: plausible values are between 22.91 and 23.29 pounds.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
